arts.sum: Sky Sports pundit Paul Merson has tipped former Tottenham striker Harry Kane to join Arsenal in a controversial move at the end of the season. Kane left Tottenham to join Bayern Munich and even though his individual form for the German giants has been great, he has failed to win silverware with the Bundesliga side.
